ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data bin */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data category */,
  "time_start" TEXT /* Start time of the data collection */,
  "time_end" TEXT /* End time of the data collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected (e.g., every 3 seconds, every 5 minutes) */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* Path to a detailed readme file for the dataset */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality score or status of the data (e.g., good, suspect, bad) */,
  "A" REAL /* Value of metric A */,
  "B" REAL /* Value of metric B */,
  "C" REAL /* Value of metric C */,
  "D" REAL /* Value of metric D */,
  "E" REAL /* Value of metric E */,
  "F" REAL /* Value of metric F */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES data_bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., °C, psi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_bins" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data bin */,
  "bin_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data bin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data bin */,
  "bin_type" TEXT /* Type of data bin (e.g., time-based, event-based) */,
  "bin_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the data bin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the category (e.g., °C, psi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type") REFERENCES alert_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  "severity_levels" TEXT /* Possible severity levels for the alert type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that was versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for the dataset */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the version has been approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., logging level, alert threshold) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last modified */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the system activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
